task:
/home/user/Documents/config.ini is an INI file with three sections (`[server]`, `[database]`, `[cache]`); each contains a `host=localhost` and a `port=8080` entry (3 occurrences of each, one per section).

In this file, replace every `localhost` with `192.168.1.100` and every `port=8080` with `port=9090`. Do not add or remove any lines — the file must remain 17 lines.

verification.description: File contains the replacement IP address 192.168.1.100
File no longer contains 'localhost' (all occurrences replaced)
File no longer contains 'port=8080' (all occurrences replaced)
File still has 17 lines (no lines added or removed)
